welcome.subtitleSimple: Mix and export AI coding skills from your projects
welcome.subtitleFull: Local tool for mixing Agent Skills across projects and exporting to AI coding tools
welcome.hintSimple: Choose a folder that contains AI skills
welcome.hintFull: Open a directory containing a `.claude/skills/` or `skills/` folder
welcome.featureMixDesc: Combine skills from multiple projects into one powerful combo.
welcome.featureExportDesc: Send to Claude Code, Cursor, Codex CLI, OpenCode in one click.
welcome.featureMergeDesc: Use the visual Merge Workbench to resolve skill conflicts.
welcome.featureHealthDesc: Validate frontmatter, detect stale or broken skills instantly.

sourcePanel.title: Source Projects
sourcePanel.emptySimple:
No projects yet.
Click + to add a folder.
sourcePanel.emptyFull:
No source projects.
Click + to open a directory.

comboPanel.emptySimple: Add skills from the left panel
comboPanel.emptyFull: No skills in combo. Add from Source Projects.

exportPanel.previewNeedsCombo: Add skills to the combo first (hover a skill, click +)
exportPanel.nameCollisionWarn: Resolve {{count}} name conflict(s) in the combo first
exportPanel.emptyComboSimple: Add skills to your combo first

healthPanel.noResults: No skills to check yet. Scan a project first.

mainLayout.selectSkillFull: Select a skill to preview its content

health.frontmatterInvalid: YAML frontmatter is missing or could not be parsed
health.frontmatterInvalidFix: Add a valid `---` frontmatter block with name and description
health.nameMissingFix: Add a name field that matches the skill directory
health.nameMismatch: name does not match the skill directory
health.nameMismatchFix: Rename the field or the directory so they match
health.nameTooLongFix: Shorten the name to 64 characters or fewer
health.nameFormat: name should use lowercase letters, digits and hyphens
health.nameFormatFix: Use a kebab-case name, e.g. code-review
health.descriptionMissingFix: Add a description that says when to use this skill
health.descriptionTooLongFix: Trim the description to 1024 characters or fewer
health.descriptionNoTriggerFix: State when to use it, e.g. 'Use when...'
health.scriptsNoCompatibility: bundles scripts but declares no compatibility
health.scriptsNoCompatibilityFix: Add a compatibility field describing the runtime requirements

security.title: Security pre-check
security.acknowledge: I have reviewed and accept this skill's risk
security.contract: AgentMix makes risk visible; it does not decide whether it is safe.

rule.network-download-execute: Downloads and executes a remote script
